name: GolfTec
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf instruction and club fitting facility that uses advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis to provide personalized coaching. They also offer custom club fitting services using TECFIT technology to match equipment to a golfer's swing. The service model centers on a Swing Evaluation to create a custom lesson plan, with additional services including practice bay access with launch monitors and virtual golf experiences. Pricing operates on a lesson and fitting basis rather than hourly bay rentals.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion tracking and launch monitor technology
Proven improvement metrics, with students averaging 7 shots better and gaining 21 more yards from fittings
Comprehensive service model covering lessons, club fitting, and practice in one location

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services provided on-site.
No mention of alcohol services provided on-site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings, though many students prefer to use their own clubs once they have a custom fitting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services or BYOB policies on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website focuses on lessons and fittings rather than simulator play time for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and their technology-based approach is suitable for young golfers learning the game.
